ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drug_concepts" (
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug concept */,
  "concept_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug concept */,
  "concept_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the drug concept */,
  "domain_id" TEXT /* Domain to which the drug concept belongs */,
  "vocabulary_id" TEXT /* Vocabulary from which the concept is derived */,
  "concept_class_id" TEXT /* Class of the drug concept */,
  "standard_concept" TEXT /* Indicates if the concept is a standard concept */,
  "invalid_reason" TEXT /* Reason for invalidation of the concept, if applicable */,
  "valid_end_date" TEXT /* End date of validity for the concept */,
  "valid_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of validity for the concept */,
  "source_vocabulary_id" TEXT /* ID of the original vocabulary from which the concept was derived */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* Additional names or synonyms for the drug concept */,
  "atc_code" TEXT /* Anatomical Therapeutic Chemical (ATC) classification code */,
  "indication" TEXT /* Medical condition or purpose for which the drug is used */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Form in which the drug is administered */,
  "dosage_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the drug */,
  "packaging_type" TEXT /* Type of packaging */,
  "packaging_quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of units in the packaging */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body responsible for approval */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Current approval status */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the concept */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the concept */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the concept */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_concepts_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES drug_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_concepts_vocabulary_id FOREIGN KEY ("vocabulary_id") REFERENCES vocabularies ("vocabulary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_concepts_concept_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_class_id") REFERENCES concept_classes ("concept_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_concepts_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the domain */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the domain */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the domain */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocabularies" (
  "vocabulary_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each vocabulary */,
  "vocabulary_name" TEXT /* Name of the vocabulary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vocabulary */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the vocabulary */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the vocabulary */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the vocabulary */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vocabulary */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the vocabulary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vocabulary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concept_classes" (
  "concept_class_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each concept class */,
  "concept_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the concept class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the concept class */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the concept class */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the concept class */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the concept class */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the concept class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standard_concepts" (
  "standard_concept_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each standard concept */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug concept */,
  "is_standard" TEXT /* Indicates if the concept is a standard concept */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the standard concept */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the standard concept */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the standard concept */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the standard concept */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standard_concepts_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES drug_concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invalid_reasons" (
  "invalid_reason_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each invalid reason */,
  "invalid_reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the invalid reason */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the invalid reason */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the invalid reason */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the invalid reason */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the invalid reason */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the invalid reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invalid_reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validity_periods" (
  "validity_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validity period */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug concept */,
  "valid_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of validity for the concept */,
  "valid_end_date" TEXT /* End date of validity for the concept */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the validity period */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the validity period */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the validity period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validity_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validity_periods_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES drug_concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, regulatory affairs, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug concept being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the concept */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the concept was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access log */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES drug_concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug form */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug concept */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug form */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the drug form */,
  "form_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the drug form */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the drug form */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the drug form */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the drug form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_forms_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES drug_concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_packaging" (
  "packaging_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug packaging */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug concept */,
  "packaging_type" TEXT /* Type of packaging */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of drugs in the packaging */,
  "packaging_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the packaging */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the packaging */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the packaging */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the packaging */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packaging_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_packaging_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES drug_concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug manufacturer */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug concept */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the manufacturer */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the manufacturer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_manufacturers_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES drug_concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_regulatory_info" (
  "regulatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory information entry */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug concept */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body responsible for approval */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the drug */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  "regulatory_number" TEXT /* Regulatory number assigned by the regulatory body */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the regulatory information */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the regulatory information */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the regulatory information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulatory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_regulatory_info_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES drug_concepts ("concept_id")
)
